title: NTRUHS Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: NTRUHS Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: NTRUHS Results 2026 OUT for MBBS Third Professional Part 2 and M.Sc Nursing exams on the official website - uhsap.in in May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the NTRUHS result.

content.text: NTRUHS Results 2026 have been officially released for various UG and PG medical courses including MBBS Third Professional Part II (R19 and R21) and M.Sc Nursing First Year and Second Year examinations conducted in March and April 2026.

NTRUHS Results 2026 have been released online on the official website - uhsap.in. Students who appeared for these examinations can check and download their results through the official result portal using their hall ticket number or login credentials.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their results. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences authorities for correction.

Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences has published MBBS Third Professional Part II and M.Sc Nursing results for the 2026 examination session on its official portal. Students can access their results online through the result portal using their hall ticket number. The direct result links are now active for quick access.

rows: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences
Third Professional Part II, Nursing Year Exams

content.text: NTRUHS has activated the direct links to check MBBS and M.Sc Nursing results through its official result portal. Students can view and download their results instantly by selecting their course and exam link from the portal.

links.label: MBBS Third Professional Part II R19 April 2026 Result
MBBS Third Professional Part II R21 April 2026 Result
MSc Nursing First Year March 2026 Result
MSc Nursing Second Year March 2026 Result

items: Visit the official result portal - http://results.uhsap.in/
Click on your respective course result link
Enter your hall ticket number or required login details
Submit the details to view your result
Download and take a printout for future reference
